name: Trailing whitespace should be removed
description: Trailing whitespace at the end of lines causes unnecessary diff noise and provides no semantic value. This rule detects spaces and tabs at the end of non-empty lines.

detection_details.description: Match spaces or tabs at end of non-empty lines
preflight_checks: Skip empty lines (whitespace-only lines are indentation, not trailing)
Skip comment-only lines where trailing space may be intentional
Skip lines within string literals (some string formatting preserves trailing spaces)

exclusions: String literals (trailing space may be intentional content)
false_positive_conditions: Multi-line string literals with intentional trailing spaces
remediation: Remove trailing whitespace from the end of lines. Most editors have a 'trim trailing whitespace' option or can be configured to do so automatically on save.
fix_playbook:
1. Identify lines with trailing whitespace
2. Remove spaces/tabs before line ending
3. Configure editor to auto-trim on save
4. Add pre-commit hook to prevent future trailing whitespace

agent_semantics.summary: Trailing whitespace detected at end of lines - this adds no value but causes diff noise
review_questions: Is this trailing whitespace intentional for formatting?
Would removing it affect any string content?
Has the editor been configured to auto-trim trailing whitespace?
semantic_chunks: Trailing whitespace is a minor formatting issue that causes unnecessary version control diffs
The offending line(s) end with spaces or tabs that serve no purpose
Fix: Remove trailing whitespace - most IDEs can do this automatically
agent_semantics.autofix_guidance: Can be automatically fixed by removing trailing whitespace from affected lines
